article_meta.title: Politics Here Are The Top 10 Lies Of Liz Cheney And The January 6th Committee By: Tristan Justice January 06, 2025 8 min

reasoning: The model correctly flagged multiple genuine bias instances in the author’s prose and avoided quoting-attribution errors. However, it systematically used non-standard/incorrect bias type labels and missed a few prominent biased phrasings (e.g., headline framing of “top 10 lies,” rhetorical flawed-logic questions).

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are in the author’s voice; no quoted or clearly attributed source language was misattributed.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged items are largely defensible examples of loaded wording, editorializing, or slant in the author’s prose; minimal to no overreach.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable bias such as the headline’s “Top 10 Lies,” rhetorical/flawed logic about lack of ‘insurrection’ charges, and other loaded phrases (e.g., “conspiracy peddled,” “covered up”).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels used (e.g., ‘Loaded Language,’ ‘Editorializing,’ ‘Minimization,’ ‘One-sided Reporting’) are outside the defined set and often map imprecisely to allowed types like Word Choice, Slant, Opinion-as-Fact, or Mudslinging.
